---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who is it for? (designer, strategist, producer, PM, etc.)

## Proposed skill or change

If a new skill: name, category, and a one-line description.
If an improvement: which skill, and what should change.

## Trigger phrases

What would the user say to invoke this? List 3–5 concrete examples.

- "..."
- "..."
- "..."

## Expected output

What should the skill produce? Markdown report? File in the Brain? Structured spec?

## Upstream / downstream chain

Does it read from other skills' output? Does its output feed into another skill?

## Philosophy check

- [ ] Enhances the creative process, does not generate creative output
- [ ] Supports the input side (research, briefs, strategy, delivery)
- [ ] Fits the professional-but-not-corporate tone
